name: clooks-marketplace
description: Plugins for the clooks hook runtime

plugins.name: clooks
plugins.description: Hook runtime for AI coding agents. TypeScript hooks with fail-closed safety, parallel execution, first-class testing, and cross-agent portability.

plugins.name: clooks-example-hooks
plugins.description: Educational hook pack: lifecycle, config, events, and debugging examples for clooks

plugins.name: clooks-core-hooks
plugins.description: Curated zero-config production hooks: command safety, git protection, tool hygiene, and tmux notifications

plugins.name: clooks-project-hooks
plugins.description: Project-configured hooks: enforce project scripts, protected paths, and JS/TS package manager choice
